about_item: AIRLINE APPROVED: The Sherpa American Airlines Pet Carrier is airline approved and part of our Guaranteed On Board program, which provides comfort and peace of mind to pets and their owners; it's perfect for traveling by air, bus, car, or train

IN-CABIN FRIENDLY: Our patented spring wire frame allows the rear end of the carrier to be pushed down several inches to easily fit under airplane seats in compliance with most major airline requirements and FAA regulations

PERFECT FOR TRAVEL: Features mesh panels for ventilation, escape-proof locking zippers, top and side entries for easy and comfortable loading, waterproof interior base, and a removable machine washable cozy base liner

VERSATILE DESIGN: Can be carried by hand with the padded top handle, or over the shoulder using the included detachable carrying strap and integrated metal D-rings - whichever suits your comfort and convenience

MULTIFUNCTIONAL: The duffel bag pet carrier can also be used as a soft-sided crate for regular outings and vet visits with cats and small dogs; includes a large storage pocket for treats, leashes, poop bags, and other small accessories
PRODUCT DETAILS: Charcoal Gray, Medium, 17" x 11" x 10.5"; fits pets up to 16 pounds

CHOOSING THE RIGHT SIZE: Choose the perfect carrier size based on your pet's measurements, followed by their weight; make sure not to exceed the maximum weight limit, and allow enough space for your pet to change positions inside the carrier
Perfect for traveling in style and comfort by plane or car, for an adventure or just a trip to the vet
Patented spring wire frame allows the rear end of the carrier to be pushed down several inches to conform to under-seat requirements

Mesh windows for ventilation, top and double sided entry with locking zippers for safety, reflective trim, padded adjustable, no-slip carrying strap, seat belt/luggage strap, machine-washable faux lambskin liner, folds flat for easy storage
Large side pocket for convenient storage of treats, leash, bags, or anything else your furry friend might need on the go
Approved for use on most airlines and included in Sherpa’s Guaranteed on Board program
Select the carrier size based on your pet’s measurements first, then by weight, and allow enough space for your pet to change positions while inside the carrier
For pets up to 16" L x 9.5" and up to 16 lbs
Carrier measures 17” L x 11” W x 10.5” H

product_details.warranty_description: Sherpa® One-Year Limited Warranty: Sherpa® warrants that for a period of one year from the date of original retail purchase, this product will be free from defects in material and workmanship. This warranty does not cover normal wear and tear, damage such as chewing or scratching caused by pets, misuse of the product, or use contrary to the operating instructions. Please retain proof of purchase; proof of purchase is required for all warranty claims. If Sherpa® determines a new product to be an appropriate replacement, it will be made with a similar product of equal or greater value. This warranty is valid for the original retail purchaser from the date of the initial retail purchase and is not transferable. The aforementioned Limited Warranty is the only warranty offered and Sherpa® disclaims all other warranties, expressed or implied (including, without limitation, the warranties of merchantability and of fitness for a particular purpose). Additionally, Sherpa® disclaims any and all liability for consequential damages resulting from the use or ownership of this product.

summary.text: Customers find the pet carrier to be of good quality, comfortable for pets, and easy to transport. The size receives mixed feedback - while it's perfect for 3-pound kittens and fits under the seat, some customers find it too small. The stability and build quality also get mixed reviews, with some finding it well-built while others say it's not sturdy enough.

insights.title: Quality
insights.summary: Customers find the pet carrier to be of great quality, with one customer noting it's much nicer than older Sherpa models.

examples.snippet: Great carrier, use it daily in the car with my 9 week old lab puppy, indestructible by him. Has mesh sides that are razor teeth proof.
Great quality, light and easy to carry. Puppy was 8 weeks and only 3 pounds, so plenty of room. I would highly recommend.
Perfect and comfortable for kitty
sherpa carriers always high quality

insights.title: Fit
insights.summary: Customers find that the pet carrier fits well under the seat, with one mentioning it accommodates a 13 lb Yorkie perfectly.

examples.snippet: Much nicer than the older Sherpa pet carriers. Fit nicely under the seat of an Embraer ERJ-175. And the top doesn't sag down like the older ones do.
...He was comfortable and it fit well under the seat infront of me when we were in the air.
I bought this to travel with my 12lb Shih-Tzu and he barely fits in it and certainly does not have any room to spare, especially for traveling under...
...It easily fit under the seat in front of me for a 2 hour flight. My small dog (14 lbs) fit perfectly and slept the whole trip home....

insights.title: Comfort
insights.summary: Customers find the pet carrier comfortable, particularly for cats and dogs of the right size, with one customer noting it's easy to carry over the shoulder.

examples.snippet: Perfect for traveling with my 12 pound cat. He was comfortable and it fit well under the seat infront of me when we were in the air.
Excellent for airline travel. Our cat was very comfortable and plenty of room under the seat....
...The cat was comfortable and seemed happy to travel with me....
...from Brazil to the US and had zero problems, she seemed to bem very comfortable....

insights.title: Portability

examples.snippet: Easy to use, easy to carry, easy to fold, just the right size for my 7 pound toy poodle. Easily fits under seat on an airplane.
Our dog loves it. Collapsible sides allow for easy stowing on airlines.
as described, no issues at the airport taking pet in cabin
Loved it very easy to carry around airport firs perfect under the plane seat

insights.title: Functionality
insights.summary: Customers find that the pet carrier works perfectly for their needs, with one mentioning it held vaccination papers and another noting it kept items within arm's reach.

examples.snippet: Functional and attractive. Try to order a bit bigger size if your airline will allow it because the puppy grows out of the small size quickly.
...this carrier worked well it was the right size. I do notice that there are some threads that are starting to come loose....
Worked well for my small dog
...This worked great to hold his vaccination papers, and when there was a little bit too much stimulation, I could turn him away so he could only see...

insights.title: Size
insights.summary: Customers have mixed opinions about the carrier's size, with some finding it perfect for 3-pound kittens and suitable for under the seat, while others consider it too small.

examples.snippet: Too small
Perfect size for under the seat. Even with a narrower space on an aisle seat, this carrier fit perfectly. It is lightweight so easy to carry....
It was too small for my dog who weights 10 lbs.
Easy to use, easy to carry, easy to fold, just the right size for my 7 pound toy poodle. Easily fits under seat on an airplane.

insights.title: Stability
insights.summary: Customers have mixed opinions about the carrier's stability, with some finding it sturdy compared to other carriers, while others report issues with it not holding its shape and not standing up on its own.

examples.snippet: ...The bag is sturdy for traveling yet comfortable for my dog. It fit under my seat without an issue and there was still some room for a small purse....
...Second, the carrier does not hold its shape and kept collapsing on the cat who was distressed enough having to be in a carrier in the first place....
Cat fits in perfectly he is not happy but he is definitely safe and secure!
The first time I used this to fly my dog the zipper failed and the dog got out. I wouldn’t recommend a pet carrier with a plastic zipper.

insights.title: Build quality
insights.summary: Customers have mixed opinions about the build quality of the pet carrier, with some finding it well-built and noting the solid bottom, while others report it isn't sturdy enough.

examples.snippet: Very well made
...Despite what others have reported, the bottom of the carrier was solid, and the top did NOT collapse on top of my kitty.
Not good it isn't sturdy enough and my cat was scared....
...Despite its sturdy build, it’s surprisingly light, which means less strain on my shoulders and more enjoyment of the journey....

authors_reviews.title: Great pet carrier!
authors_reviews.text: Awesome pet carrier! Built quality is amazing, has lots of opening options and folds on itself for easy storage. I traveled with my pomeranian from Brazil to the US and had zero problems, she seemed to bem very comfortable. Can't speak about American Airlines, but we had no problem with Copa Airlines.
authors_reviews.author: Giovanna

authors_reviews.title: Made Airline Travel A Breeze
authors_reviews.text: My cat is a long dude and weighs 8.5 lbs - he fit well in the carrier. Seemed comfortable. He did have a brief freak out (there was a dog), but did not seem to be able to chew through or scratch the fabric. When we aren't traveling, he likes to sit in it, which is such a good sign.I enjoyed having multiple options with the smaller handles and the longer side strap. It also fits incredibly well on the top of my rolling suitcase - which made navigating through the airport a breeze. It was a bit bouncier when I was physically carrying it than his other carrier, but when secured to the top of the luggage, it was great. The fabric made it easier to fit under the seat in front of me, but also kept enough space so he didn't get squished.He also gets very motion sick, so ventilation was really important to us - he got a lot of airflow. This carrier was perfect - lots of ventilation, but he could still stay not super visible (which he prefers). One side does not have the mesh but a pocket instead. This worked great to hold his vaccination papers, and when there was a little bit too much stimulation, I could turn him away so he could only see me.I was very happy with this product and would highly recommend to anyone traveling via airplane.
authors_reviews.author: C

authors_reviews.title: Perfect carrier
authors_reviews.text: Easy to use, easy to carry, easy to fold, just the right size for my 7 pound toy poodle. Easily fits under seat on an airplane.
authors_reviews.author: S. Phillips

authors_reviews.title: Comfortable and safe.
authors_reviews.text: My dog was very comfortable and relaxed in this carrier.
authors_reviews.author: Sue

authors_reviews.title: The hard floor is pretty flimsy
authors_reviews.text: Otherwise it's pretty nice and was able to fit under the seat in front of my on a recent airline flight.
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Not nearly as well designed and made as Sherpa's other carriers
authors_reviews.text: I am a little surprised American Airlines put their stamp of approval on this carrier. It is not nearly as functional as the other Sherpa Carriers. The Sherpa Deluxe and the Sherpa Delta model are much better choices. First, the whole thing collapses when the doors are unzipped making it impossible to usher your pet into the carrier. Second the top zippered opening where your pet can stick their head out of is 2-3 inches behind the door, meaning if your pet is longer than 12 inches it will be very difficult to get their head out of the opening. Third, I think the sizing is too generous at up to 16 pounds. This carrier is better suited for up to 13 pounds, maybe 14 pounds max in my opinion. You get way more space in the Sherpa Deluxe which is also for pets up to 16 pounds. And with the Sherpa Delta model you get an extra inch of length, but be sure to check the measurements with your airline before making the purchase to ensure you can fly with the Delta model. I had great hopes for this carrier, but it just doesn't stand up to the other Sherpa models. Save yourself the hassle of buying this carrier and go with the Sherpa Deluxe.
authors_reviews.author: EB

authors_reviews.title: Guaranteed On Board!
authors_reviews.text: Setting off on an adventure with my furry companion has never been easier or more stress-free, thanks to the Sherpa American Airlines Travel Pet Carrier. From the moment we embarked on our journey, this carrier proved to be a game-changer. Its airline-approved design and Guaranteed On Board promise provided peace of mind, ensuring we could stay together, soaring through the skies with ease.The carrier itself is a masterpiece of comfort and convenience. Its plush sherpa lining offers a cozy haven for pets, making the hustle and bustle of airports a far more bearable experience for them. The thoughtful ventilation on all sides ensures ample airflow, keeping my pet cool and calm throughout the flight. Additionally, the adjustable shoulder strap and top and side entry options have made maneuvering through crowded spaces a breeze, emphasizing the carrier’s user-friendly design.What truly sets this carrier apart is its durability combined with lightweight construction. Despite its sturdy build, it’s surprisingly light, which means less strain on my shoulders and more enjoyment of the journey. The zippered pockets are a clever addition, perfect for storing treats, documents, and other essentials, keeping everything within arm’s reach.The Sherpa American Airlines Travel Pet Carrier has transformed our travel experience, turning what was once a source of anxiety into an enjoyable and seamless part of our adventures. It’s not just a carrier; it’s a portable peace of mind that respects the needs of pets and pet parents alike. For anyone who treasures their travels with their pets, this carrier is an absolute must-have, guaranteeing comfort, safety, and style on every journey.
authors_reviews.author: MANDY Jo

authors_reviews.title: I havent used this on my trip yet..
authors_reviews.text: However.... it should work well. I needed to replace a random brand carrier I had that was about to break. I searched on amazon for months trying to find the best that didnt break the bank. Originally I ordered a backpack version but it was too bulky for my petite frame. I also ordered the comfort strap (which should be included as the regular strap on all these carriers in my opinion) I almost always try to purchase returned (like new) items and found this bag for 20$ in perfect condition. Not sure its worth 119$ yikes! So look in the used return section first! Youre welcome.
authors_reviews.author: JP

other_countries_reviews.title: Worked out really great for a trip home on an airplane.
other_countries_reviews.text: This worked really well to get my pup home on a plane. It came with a liner but bought a 2nd liner as well in case there was an accident. The puppy felt very safe in it and traveled well. She was able to be transferred in it for another month or so before she grew out of it. She loved sleeping in it and always felt secure in it.
other_countries_reviews.author: Entlebucherlover

other_countries_reviews.title: Confiable
other_countries_reviews.text: Me pareció un artículo con muy buena calidad. Resistente y sobre todo, pasó la prueba al no tener problemas para viajar en cabina en un viaje nacional en México.La perrita de mi mamá es una chihuaha de no mas de 5 kilos. Estuvo cómoda y para nosotros también fue sencillo transladarla en ella. Recomendable.
other_countries_reviews.author: Ana María Carballido
